hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -z "$f" ] && exit 0; case "$f" in *.js|*.jsx|*.ts|*.tsx|*.json|*.css|*.scss|*.html|*.md|*.yml|*.yaml) command -v prettier >/dev/null 2>&1 && prettier --write "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1 ;; *.py) command -v black >/dev/null 2>&1 && black -q "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1 ;; *.go) command -v gofmt >/dev/null 2>&1 && gofmt -w "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1 ;; *.rs) command -v rustfmt >/dev/null 2>&1 && rustfmt "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1 ;; esac; exit 0
